# Audio Credits

## Sound Effects

### 80 CC0 RPG SFX
- License: CC0 (Public Domain)
- Source: https://opengameart.org/content/80-cc0-rpg-sfx
- Used for: attack, enemy, boss, pickup, checkpoint, transform, UI sounds

### 12 Player Movement SFX
- License: CC-BY 4.0 / CC-BY 3.0
- Source: https://opengameart.org/content/12-player-movement-sfx
- Used for: jump, land, player hurt sounds

## Music

### Forest Whisper Theme
- Author: Cleyton Kauffman
- License: CC0 (Public Domain)
- Source: https://opengameart.org/content/forest-whisper-theme
- Used for: forest/exploration music

### Dark Ambience Loop
- Author: Iwan Gabovitch (qubodup.net)
- License: CC-BY 3.0
- Source: https://opengameart.org/content/dark-ambience-loop
- Used for: boss battle / dark form music
